description: Production logs for Adobe Campaign email delivery and bounce tracking. Includes Momentum MTA event logs (eventlog_momentum) for delivery/bounce analysis, Campaign MTA process logs (mta*) for delivery scheduling and SMTP operations, and Apache access/error logs (access_combined, access_combined_wcookie, apache_error) for HTTP request tracking. IMPORTANT NAMING CONVENTION: Campaign MTA logs (mta*) use DASHES in host names (e.g., singapo-mkt-prod2-1). Momentum logs (eventlog_momentum) use UNDERSCORES in cust.InstanceName (e.g., singapo_mkt_prod2).

sourcetypes.name: eventlog_momentum
sourcetypes.description: Momentum MTA event logs (delivery confirmations, bounces, deferrals). NOTE: Due to indexing inconsistency, these logs exist in BOTH index=campaign_prod AND index=momentum_prod. Always query with: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod)

sourcetypes.name: mta*
sourcetypes.description: Campaign MTA process logs - delivery scheduling and SMTP operations

sourcetypes.name: access_combined
sourcetypes.description: Apache combined access logs - HTTP requests to Campaign web tier (ELB health checks, API calls, tracking pixels)

sourcetypes.name: access_combined_wcookie
sourcetypes.description: Apache access logs with TLS/cookie details - includes SSL version, cipher suite, and session info

sourcetypes.name: apache_error
sourcetypes.description: Apache error logs - HTTP errors, invalid URIs (AH10244), module failures

field_categories.description: Core delivery and bounce data from Momentum MTA. These are the PRIMARY fields for analyzing email delivery success/failure.

fields.name: msys.message_event.type
fields.description: Event type indicating delivery outcome. Primary values are delivery, reception, inband, tempfail.

values.reception: Message received by Momentum for processing
values.inband: Permanent bounce - hard failure during SMTP conversation (hard bounce)
values.tempfail: Temporary failure - will be retried (soft bounce)

fields.name: msys.message_event.bounce_class
fields.description: Bounce classification code indicating failure type

values.10: Invalid Recipient - user does not exist
values.21: Bad Domain - no MX or A record for domain
values.22: Bad Mailbox - mailbox does not exist
values.50: Mail Block - blocked by receiving server
values.52: Spam Content - content flagged as spam

fields.name: msys.message_event.error_code
fields.description: SMTP error code from receiving server

values.421: Service not available - try again later
values.454: TLS not available / No MX for domain

fields.name: msys.message_event.reason
examples: 550 5.1.1 ...@... Recipient address rejected: ... in virtual alias table
454 4.4.4 [internal] no MX or A for domain

fields.name: msys.message_event.raw_reason
fields.description: Full original bounce message from receiving server
examples: 454 4.4.4 [internal] no MX or A for domain

fields.name: msys.message_event.binding
fields.description: Sending IP binding used for delivery

fields.name: msys.message_event.binding_group
fields.description: Binding group for IP pool management

fields.name: msys.message_event.ip_address
fields.description: IP address of receiving mail server

fields.name: msys.message_event.node_name
fields.description: Momentum MTA node that processed the message

fields.name: msys.message_event.conn_stage
fields.description: SMTP connection stage when event occurred

fields.name: msys.message_event.next_attempt
fields.description: Unix timestamp of next delivery retry

field_categories.description: Custom metadata attached to messages by Campaign
Custom Campaign metadata added to Momentum events

fields.name: cust.InstanceName
fields.description: Campaign instance name - THE PRIMARY FIELD for filtering eventlog_momentum by customer/instance. Uses UNDERSCORES as separator (e.g., southwest_airlines_mkt_prod18, NOT southwest-airlines-mkt-prod18). When user mentions an instance with dashes, convert to underscores. This is the ONLY way to filter deliveries/bounces by Campaign instance in eventlog_momentum. DO NOT use host for instance filtering - host is the Momentum MTA server.

field_categories.description: Fields from Campaign MTA logs (mta* sourcetype)

fields.name: message
examples: New attempt to establish SMPP connection

field_categories.description: Fields related to bounce processing and recipient addresses (mta* sourcetype)
Standard fields present across all sourcetypes

fields.name: host
fields.description: Hostname of the server generating the log. For eventlog_momentum, host is the Momentum MTA server (e.g., momentum08.sin2.cpt.adobe.net). For mta*, host is the Campaign server using DASHES (e.g., singapo-mkt-prod2-1). To filter eventlog_momentum by Campaign instance, use cust.InstanceName with UNDERSCORES (e.g., singapo_mkt_prod2).

field_categories.description: AWS instance metadata (present on cloud-hosted instances)
Fields from Apache access logs (access_combined, access_combined_wcookie) - HTTP request tracking

fields.name: clientip
fields.description: Client IP address making the request (may be load balancer IP)

fields.name: uri
fields.description: Request URI path (extracted from request field)

fields.name: http_status
fields.description: HTTP response status code (extracted via rex pattern)

fields.name: resp_time_ms
fields.description: Response time in milliseconds (extracted via rex pattern)

field_categories.description: Fields from apache_error logs - HTTP server errors

fields.name: client
fields.description: Client IP and port causing the error

query_patterns.use_case: Calculate delivery (sent emails) success rate for a time period
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.type | eventstats sum(count) as total | eval percentage=round(count/total*100,2) | table msys.message_event.type count percentage

query_patterns.use_case: Analyze bounces by bounce class
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.bounce_class=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find which domains have the most bounces
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type IN ("inband", "tempfail") earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.routing_domain | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Get detailed bounce reasons
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.bounce_class=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.reason | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Sent email/delivery statistics by customer
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest={time_range} | stats count by cust.customerID msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Sent email/delivery statistics by Campaign instance
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest={time_range} | stats count by cust.InstanceName msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find permanent/hard bounces
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="inband" earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find temporary/soft bounces
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="tempfail" earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find bounces for a specific Campaign instance. Use cust.InstanceName with UNDERSCORES (e.g., virginatlantic_mkt_prod1, NOT virginatlantic-mkt-prod1). Supports wildcards like virginatlantic_mkt_prod*
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.InstanceName={instance_pattern} msys.message_event.type IN ("inband", "tempfail") earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.type msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Count sent emails/deliveries for a specific Campaign instance. Use cust.InstanceName with UNDERSCORES (e.g., virginatlantic_mkt_prod1). Supports wildcards.
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.InstanceName={instance_pattern} msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest={time_range} | stats count by cust.DeliveryInternalName | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find invalid recipient bounces (bounce_class 10)
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.bounce_class="10" earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.routing_domain | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Sent email/delivery volume over time
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest={time_range} | timechart span=1h count

query_patterns.use_case: MTA process errors
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Error counts per Campaign host/instance
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: MTA process warnings (database issues, script errors, NewRelic failures)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=warning earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: SSL/TLS connection errors in MTA (IOB-090020)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=error "IOB-090020" earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: SMPP (SMS) connection failures
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=error "SMP-540004" earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: DNS resolution failures in MTA (IOB-090008)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=error "IOB-090008" earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: MTA process logs showing delivery scheduling (NOT for counting sent emails - use eventlog_momentum patterns instead)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=info ("DEL-430015" OR "Starting scheduled delivery") earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Database connectivity issues (XSV-350152)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=warning "XSV-350152" earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: JavaScript compilation errors in deliveries (JST-310000)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* "JST-310000" earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Find sent emails/deliveries for a specific customer
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.customerID="*{customer_name}*" earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.type cust.DeliveryInternalName | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Analyze SMTP error codes
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.error_code=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.error_code | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Statistics by Momentum MTA node
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.node_name msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Analyze sent email queue/latency times
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest={time_range} | stats avg(msys.message_event.queue_time) as avg_queue_ms by cust.InstanceName | eval avg_queue_sec=round(avg_queue_ms/1000,2) | sort -avg_queue_sec

query_patterns.use_case: Messages requiring multiple retry attempts
query_patterns.spl_template: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.num_retries>0 earliest={time_range} | stats count avg(msys.message_event.num_retries) as avg_retries by msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find all events for a specific Campaign instance
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod cust.InstanceName="{instance_name}" earliest={time_range} | stats count by sourcetype msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: HTTP response status distribution from Apache access logs
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie earliest={time_range} | stats count by status | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find HTTP 4xx and 5xx errors in Apache access logs
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie status>=400 earliest={time_range} | stats count by host status request | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Request volume by URI pattern
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie earliest={time_range} | rex field=request "\w+ (?<uri>[^ ]+)" | stats count by uri | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Analyze Apache error log entries
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=apache_error earliest={time_range} | rex field=_raw "\[(?<error_code>AH\d+)\]" | stats count by host error_code | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Find invalid URI errors (AH10244) in Apache
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=apache_error AH10244 earliest={time_range} | stats count by host client | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: TLS protocol version distribution from HTTPS requests
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie ssl_protocol=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by ssl_protocol | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Track SOAP router POST requests with 200 status over time
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" "200 " earliest={time_range} | timechart span=10m count

query_patterns.use_case: SOAP router request volume broken down by host
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" "200 " earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find top client IPs making requests
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie POST OR "soaprouter.jsp" " 200 " earliest={time_range} | stats count by clientip | sort -count LIMIT=30

query_patterns.use_case: Track Interaction API POST/GET requests across all Apache logs
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype="access_combined*" "POST /interaction/" OR "GET /interaction/" earliest={time_range} | timechart span=5m count by host

query_patterns.use_case: Average response time for Interaction API calls by host
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie "POST /interaction/" earliest={time_range} | rex field=_raw "(?ms)^(?:[^/\n]*/){7}(?P<resp_time_ms>\d+)" | timechart span=5m avg(resp_time_ms) by host

query_patterns.use_case: Find slowest Interaction API URIs by response time
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie "POST /interaction/" earliest={time_range} | rex field=_raw "(?ms)^(?:[^/\n]*/){7}(?P<resp_time_ms>\d+)" | stats avg(resp_time_ms) as avg_ms by host uri | sort -avg_ms | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Count total HTTP requests hitting a server (all API calls)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype="access_combined*" earliest={time_range} | stats count

query_patterns.use_case: Count HTTP requests by URI/endpoint for a server
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype="access_combined*" earliest={time_range} | rex field=request "\w+ (?<uri>[^ ]+)" | stats count by uri | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: HTTP request volume over time for a server
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod host={server} sourcetype="access_combined*" earliest={time_range} | timechart span=5m count

1.name: Undetermined
1.description: Bounce reason could not be determined

21.name: Bad Domain
21.description: No MX or A record for domain

51.name: Spam Related
51.description: Blocked as spam by receiving server

delivery.description: Message successfully delivered to recipient MTA

reception.description: Message received by Momentum for processing

inband.description: Permanent bounce during SMTP conversation (hard bounce)

tempfail.description: Temporary failure, message will be retried (soft bounce)

irc_code_reference.description: Common iRc (internal return code) values across Campaign logs. Negative values indicate errors.

-53.name: General Error
-53.description: Generic error condition, check message for details

16384.name: Invalid/Not Found
16384.description: Resource not found or invalid parameter

-52.name: File/Permission Error
-52.description: Cannot read/write file or create directory

error_code_reference.description: Common Campaign error codes (format: XXX-NNNNNN). Search with: message_type=error | rex field=_raw "(?<error_code>[A-Z]{2,4}-\d{6})"

XTK-170036.description: Unable to parse expression - invalid schema path or attribute

common_use_cases.question: Show me bounces for the last hour
common_use_cases.description: Find all bounce events (hard and soft) from Momentum MTA
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type IN ("inband", "tempfail") earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class

common_use_cases.question: What's the delivery success rate?
common_use_cases.description: Calculate delivery success vs failure percentages
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.type | eventstats sum(count) as total | eval pct=round(count/total*100,2)

common_use_cases.question: Which domains have the most bounces?
common_use_cases.description: Find receiving domains with highest bounce counts
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type IN ("inband", "tempfail") earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.routing_domain | sort -count | head 20

common_use_cases.question: Show me hard bounces (permanent failures)
common_use_cases.description: Find inband bounces which are permanent/hard failures
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="inband" earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

common_use_cases.question: Show me soft bounces (temporary failures)
common_use_cases.description: Find tempfail bounces which are temporary/soft failures
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="tempfail" earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

common_use_cases.question: Bounces for a specific instance like virginatlantic
common_use_cases.description: Find bounces filtered by Campaign instance using cust.InstanceName (use underscores)
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.InstanceName=virginatlantic_mkt_prod* msys.message_event.type IN ("inband", "tempfail") earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class

common_use_cases.question: Deliveries for a specific customer/instance
common_use_cases.description: Find successful deliveries by Campaign instance
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.InstanceName=singapo_mkt_prod* msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest=-1h | stats count by cust.DeliveryInternalName | sort -count

common_use_cases.question: What SMTP error codes are we seeing?
common_use_cases.description: Analyze SMTP error codes from bounce events
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.error_code=* earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.error_code | sort -count

common_use_cases.question: Show me 550 error bounces
common_use_cases.description: Find bounces with specific SMTP 550 error code (mailbox unavailable)
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.error_code="550" earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

common_use_cases.question: What are the bounce reasons?
common_use_cases.description: Get detailed bounce reason messages
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.bounce_class=* earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.reason | sort -count | head 20

common_use_cases.question: Delivery volume over time
common_use_cases.description: Chart delivery events by hour
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest=-24h | timechart span=1h count

common_use_cases.question: Show me MTA errors
common_use_cases.description: Find errors in Campaign MTA process logs
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta* message_type=error earliest=-1h | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

common_use_cases.question: Invalid recipient bounces
common_use_cases.description: Find bounces where recipient doesn't exist (bounce_class 10)
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.bounce_class="10" earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.routing_domain | sort -count

common_use_cases.question: Delivery statistics by customer
common_use_cases.description: Show delivery counts grouped by customer ID
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest=-1h | stats count by cust.customerID msys.message_event.type | sort -count

common_use_cases.question: Message queue times / delivery latency
common_use_cases.description: Analyze how long messages spend in queue before delivery
common_use_cases.spl_example: (index=campaign_prod OR index=momentum_prod) sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest=-1h | stats avg(msys.message_event.queue_time) as avg_queue_ms by cust.InstanceName | eval avg_queue_sec=round(avg_queue_ms/1000,2) | sort -avg_queue_sec

common_use_cases.question: What HTTP errors are happening in Apache?
common_use_cases.description: Find 4xx and 5xx HTTP errors from Apache access logs
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie status>=400 earliest=-1h | stats count by host status | sort -count | head 20

common_use_cases.question: Are there invalid URL errors?
common_use_cases.description: Find Apache AH10244 invalid URI path errors
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=apache_error AH10244 earliest=-1h | stats count by host client | sort -count | head 20

common_use_cases.question: What TLS versions are clients using?
common_use_cases.description: Check SSL/TLS protocol distribution from HTTPS requests
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie ssl_protocol=* earliest=-1h | stats count by ssl_protocol | sort -count

common_use_cases.question: How are SOAP router requests performing?
common_use_cases.description: Track SOAP router (soaprouter.jsp) request volume and success rate
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie "soaprouter.jsp" "200 " earliest=-1h | timechart span=10m count

common_use_cases.question: Which client IPs are making the most requests?
common_use_cases.description: Find top client IPs by request volume
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie earliest=-1h | stats count by clientip | sort -count | head 30

common_use_cases.question: What's the Interaction API response time?
common_use_cases.description: Analyze response times for /interaction/ API endpoints
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie "POST /interaction/" earliest=-1h | rex field=_raw "(?ms)^(?:[^/\n]*/){7}(?P<resp_time_ms>\d+)" | timechart span=5m avg(resp_time_ms) by host

common_use_cases.question: Which API endpoints are slowest?
common_use_cases.description: Find slowest URIs by average response time
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie "POST /interaction/" earliest=-1h | rex field=_raw "(?ms)^(?:[^/\n]*/){7}(?P<resp_time_ms>\d+)" | stats avg(resp_time_ms) as avg_ms by uri | sort -avg_ms | head 20

common_use_cases.question: How many API calls / HTTP requests are hitting a server?
common_use_cases.description: Count total HTTP requests to a specific Campaign server
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod host=circlek-rt-prod23 sourcetype="access_combined*" | stats count

common_use_cases.question: What endpoints/URIs are being called on a server?
common_use_cases.description: Break down HTTP requests by URI for a specific server
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod host=circlek-rt-prod23 sourcetype="access_combined*" | rex field=request "\w+ (?<uri>[^ ]+)" | stats count by uri | sort -count | head 20

common_use_cases.question: Show HTTP traffic over time for a server
common_use_cases.description: Chart HTTP request volume over time for a specific server
common_use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod host=circlek-rt-prod23 sourcetype="access_combined*" | timechart span=5m count
